narrative: US-Iran ceasefire strain and RBA hawkishness drive price action as risk aversion firmed overnight — gold lower -0.13%; equities -0.41%; DXY +0.33%; VIX 18.3. USD/JPY holds at 157.24 as intervention risk near 160.00 offsets the 300bp Fed-BoJ carry advantage. AUD/USD retreats to 0.7169 despite the RBA hiking to 4.10% as Governor Bullock warns of persistent inflation. Watch Swiss CPI at 07:00 UTC and RBA commentary for further directional cues.
